phase_name: Portable Core, Adapter, and Overlay Scaffold

commands_run.command: code -r .; code --goto core\README.md:1; code --goto overlays\forsetti-windows\README.md:1; code --status
Visual Studio Developer Command environment plus PowerShell repository validator

commands_run.result: pass: no whitespace errors; Git line-ending warnings only
pass: Phase 01 payload separated from pre-existing untracked evidence

tooling_used.filesystem: PowerShell, apply_patch, Visual Studio Code workspace inspection
tooling_used.local_git: Git CLI branch, diff, status, and scope evidence
tooling_used.local_indexer: rg --files, git ls-files, Visual Studio Code workspace indexing
tooling_used.knowledge_graph: repository instruction hierarchy, task contract, and role-review trace as local governance graph
tooling_used.local_linter: repository validator, git diff --check, JSON parsing, and targeted source-line scans

provider_decisions: No non-local third-party provider was used.
No product dependency on MCP servers, OpenAI tooling, GitHub Actions, sub-agents, Docker, WSL, Visual Studio, Visual Studio Code, or any local IDE was introduced.
Configured local MCP entries were inspected with codex mcp list; equivalent local-first tooling was used when separate MCP namespaces were not exposed in the running thread.
Docker and WSL were not used because Phase 01 is a documentation scaffold and does not require them.

sub_agent_findings.finding: feature/sensitive/minor classification is appropriate for an additive scaffold.
README, wiki, glossary, and changelog updates were required.
sub_agent_findings.reconciliation: Updated README, wiki overview/home/changelog/glossary, wiki footer source lines, and changelog.

sub_agent_findings.finding: Phase 01 should remain scaffold-only and preserve one-way dependency direction.
sub_agent_findings.reconciliation: Kept implementation, validator, registry, and workflow conversion out of scope.

sub_agent_findings.finding: Contract needed clearer reviewer authority and core constitution boundary.
sub_agent_findings.reconciliation: Updated contract to require Architect and Validator review and state subordinate authority.

sub_agent_findings.finding: Phase 01 reports were missing, scope evidence needed untracked-aware handling, and wiki changelog sync omitted a canonical block.
sub_agent_findings.reconciliation: Added reports, amended scope validation wording, excluded pre-existing untracked evidence, and restored the wiki changelog block.

sub_agent_findings.finding: Wiki traceability headers and PR reference fields were incomplete.
sub_agent_findings.reconciliation: Added headers and pending branch PR references; after re-review, corrected the glossary header to reference repository governance and Phase 01 scaffold canonical sources instead of the wiki page itself.

sub_agent_findings.finding: Final re-review passed with no issues in the staged Phase 01 payload.

known_issues: Pre-existing untracked evidence under .forsetti/remediation-v2/ and earlier .forsetti/remediation-v3/ phase files remains unstaged and excluded from the Phase 01 payload.
Pre-existing documentation sync drift remains in policies/docs-sync-rules.json and is out of scope for Phase 01.
